name: Cracker Toffee
recipeInstructions:
1. Line a cookie sheet with foil.
2. Arrange the crackers on the foil.
3. Melt the butter.
4. Add the sugar and boil for 3 minutes until thickened.
5. Spread the mixture over the crackers.
6. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 7 minutes.
7. Turn off the oven.
8. Sprinkle the chocolate chips over the crackers.
9. Put the cookie sheet back in the oven until the chocolate is soft.
10. Spread the chocolate evenly over the crackers.
11. Refrigerate until set.
12. Break into pieces and store in the refrigerator.
